markers.name: Cutthroat's Escape
markers.desc: The bandit hideout has to have Perithan, hopefully alive.

markers.name: Mournfield
markers.desc: What walks here is living and dead and will rob you.

markers.name: Infected Delve
markers.desc: An abandoned mine now festers with maggots and disease.

markers.name: Temple of the Fathomless
markers.desc: An otherworldly melody echoes from the deep.

markers.name: Onyx Hold
markers.desc: Undead wardens still patrol the halls of this prison.

markers.name: Borza's Hideout
markers.desc: Borza, the thief who left Nizaar to die, hides in the caves.

markers.name: Crumbling Hekma
markers.desc: A hate-infested catacomb of the Zakarum faith.

markers.name: Seaside Descent
markers.desc: A cove nestled among a graveyard of shipwrecks.

markers.name: Sepulcher of The Forsworn
markers.desc: Evil stirs below the altar of Baal.

markers.name: The Training Grounds
markers.desc: Where curious wanderers go to hone their craft.

markers.name: Dark Ravine
markers.desc: A Triune ritual site. The screams echo far and wide.

markers.name: Temple of The Primes
markers.desc: The seat of the Triune's power, hidden for millennia.

markers.name: Light's Watch
markers.desc: A Knights' keep, repurposed for bandits and other parasites.

markers.name: Maulwood
markers.desc: Bandits have claimed these woods and its monsters.

markers.name: Caldera Gate
markers.desc: The demons in this icy cave are growing stronger.

markers.name: Derelict Lodge
markers.desc: Once a hunting lodge, now ruled by demons.

markers.name: Nostrava Deepwood
markers.desc: The undead roam among the trees.

markers.name: Mercy's Reach
markers.desc: This crumbling keep was once a way through the mountains.

markers.name: Kor Dragan Barracks
markers.desc: The honored halls have been left for the dead to wander.

markers.name: Forbidden City
markers.desc: An ancient tomb lies open, its corruption spilling forth.

markers.name: Hallowed Ossuary
markers.desc: A tomb of martyrs, desecrated and made powerful again.

markers.name: Black Asylum
markers.desc: An abandoned prison teeming with the wails of its inmates.

markers.name: Forsaken Quarry
markers.desc: These once-barren mineshafts now harbor ghastly rituals.

markers.name: Hoarfrost Demise
markers.desc: An icy Goatman cave, littered with corpses and bones.

markers.name: Zenith
markers.desc: Unmapped tunnels sprawl beneath the peaks.

markers.name: Dead Man's Dredge
markers.desc: The predators that dwell in this cave hunt human game.

markers.name: Ancient's Seat
markers.desc: Bats swarm this place, murmurating in time with the wind.

markers.name: Guulrahn Canals
markers.desc: A rot that even the cannibal tyrant will not touch is below.

markers.name: Guulrahn Slums
markers.desc: Cannibals still hold the streets of the city Guulrahn.

markers.name: Whispering Vault
markers.desc: Scholarly halls haunted by whispering spirits of the insane.

markers.name: Shifting City
markers.desc: These ruins were once a refuge for the people of Qara-Yisu.

markers.name: Pallid Delve
markers.desc: Cannibals guard a dark power in the crumbling mines.

markers.name: Glacial Fissure
markers.desc: An ancient cavern reopened by the shifting ice.

markers.name: Tormented Ruins
markers.desc: It's been centuries since this watchtower saw mortal use.

markers.name: Lost Archives
markers.desc: Many speculate what lies within, but few dare to venture on.

markers.name: Defiled Catacomb
markers.desc: Graverobbers warn against the temptations of this crypt.

markers.name: Calibel's Mine
markers.desc: The bandits that took this mine are ignorant of its secrets.

markers.name: Howling Warren
markers.desc: A corrupted den of wolves and wargs, hungry for human flesh.

markers.name: Sunken Ruins
markers.desc: Rumors stir of a healer turned renegade necromancer.

markers.name: Oldstones
markers.desc: Khazra infest the ruined holdfast, ignorant of its curse.

markers.name: Sarat's Lair
markers.desc: What once was a wildlife den has become a nest.

markers.name: Hive
markers.desc: An insatiable will drives these creatures to feed.

markers.name: Whispering Pines
markers.desc: Astaroth is gone now, but his grip on this keep holds fast.

markers.name: Maddux Watch
markers.desc: This abandoned outpost treads atop the dead.

markers.name: Ferals' Den
markers.desc: A lodge corrupted by the druids' hate.

markers.name: Twisted Hollow
markers.desc: A veritable reservoir of wildlife where answers may lurk.

markers.name: The Pit
markers.desc: A Horadric mystery buried deep in the veins of the land.

markers.name: The Tower
markers.desc: Built to cull the weak and empower the strong.

markers.name: Ancient Reservoir
markers.desc: A tainted wellspring runs under these ruins.

markers.name: Haunted Refuge
markers.desc: The old church sinks into the delta, drowning slowly.

markers.name: Belfry Zakara
markers.desc: The Zakarum built this Cathedral. It honors the sea, now.

markers.name: Witchwater
markers.desc: Nangari cultists lure prey here with songs sung in dreams.

markers.name: Quiet Clearing
markers.desc: A hidden clearing Lyndon uses to stash "the good stuff."

markers.name: Secluded Clearing
markers.desc: Only Lyndon and the Drowned know of this hidden clearing.

markers.name: Faceless Shrine
markers.desc: One of Hawezar’s less secretive cults. Sinners welcome.

markers.name: Hidden Glade
markers.desc: An ancient clearing pulsing with the magic of the swamps.

markers.name: Isolated Shack
markers.desc: A remote, unassuming shack, perfect for discreet meetings.

markers.name: Ruins of Eridu
markers.desc: A once-mighty fortress consumed by the swamp.

markers.name: Ghoa Ruins
markers.desc: Once a keep. The swamp reclaims all that mortal hands build.

markers.name: Leviathan's Maw
markers.desc: Cultists lurk in these flooded ruins.

markers.name: Maugan's Works
markers.desc: A rotting hall for criminals and deserters.

markers.name: Blind Burrows
markers.desc: The spiders here have acquired a taste for flesh.

markers.name: Abandoned Mineworks
markers.desc: A maze of tunnels, still walked by those who died here.

markers.name: Hanged Man's Hall
markers.desc: You hear a faint sound: the hiss of chains on stone.

markers.name: Sirocco Caverns
markers.desc: A foul infestation has claimed these caverns.

markers.name: Halls of the Damned
markers.desc: Triune mages once pioneered strange magics here...

markers.name: Conclave
markers.desc: Tales of profane rituals grip the people with fear.

markers.name: Hakan's Refuge
markers.desc: This one grand manor lies in ruins, festering with memories.

markers.name: Gaping Crevasse
markers.desc: Fetid air billows from a ravine in the desert.

markers.name: Forgotten Ruins
markers.desc: Serpents infest the bones of these forbidden mage halls.

markers.name: Tunnels Beneath The Oasis
markers.desc: Sharp acrid smells seep from the hidden caverns.

markers.name: Corrupted Grotto
markers.desc: The forgotten dead languish under barren rock.

markers.name: Putrid Aquifer
markers.desc: Death taints the water.

markers.name: Uldur's Cave
markers.desc: A den of murderers and carrion feeders.

markers.name: Astaroth's Lair
markers.desc: Den of the Charred Duke.

markers.name: Heretics Asylum
markers.desc: A jail home to the corrupt and cruel.

markers.name: Shivta Ruins
markers.desc: The corruption in Alcarnus has bled into these ruins.

markers.name: Inferno
markers.desc: We have carved into the rock to seek Hell.

markers.name: Palace of the Deceiver
markers.desc: There were glories here once, but now only agonies await.

markers.name: Tomb of the Saints
markers.desc: This barren tomb was once fat with gold.

markers.name: Sunken Library
markers.desc: The dead guard secrets confined in the ancient vault.

markers.name: Collapsed Vault
markers.desc: In dead hands do these ancient treasures lie.

markers.name: Deserted Underpass
markers.desc: A threat lurks in caves under the ruined Overlook.

markers.name: Malignant Burrow
markers.desc: Ichor weeps from a hole in the earth.

markers.name: Endless Gates
markers.desc: Unholy creatures run amok between realms.

markers.name: Bastion of Faith
markers.desc: Lost and starving, the knights became beasts.

markers.name: Earthen Wound
markers.desc: The demons that dwelled here became a feast for cannibals.

markers.name: Lost Keep
markers.desc: Yet another rotting keep abandoned by the Cathedral.

markers.name: Heathen's Keep
markers.desc: These Knights have sworn allegiance to a new leader.

markers.name: Light's Refuge
markers.desc: In a forgotten home lies a nest made of teeth and armor.

markers.name: Rimescar Cavern
markers.desc: A cave reclaimed by demons and sickened with their magic.

markers.name: Anica's Claim
markers.desc: Inhuman hands carved out these dark tunnels.

markers.name: Cultist Refuge
markers.desc: The last bastion of Nostrava’s cultists.

markers.name: Flooded Depths
markers.desc: More than the waters have made claim to these shipwrecks.

markers.name: Wretched Delve
markers.desc: Demonic plague festers now in the old tombs of Túr Dúlra.

markers.name: Underroot
markers.desc: Ruins deep under Túr Dúlra, its roots thick with rot.

markers.name: Yshari Sanctum
markers.desc: Cultists corrupt the ancient Sanctum.

markers.name: Renegade's Retreat
markers.desc: Renegade knights reap the spoils of Inarius’ crusade.

markers.name: Crusaders' Cathedral
markers.desc: Knights seized this temple and its undead warriors alike.

markers.name: Prison of Caldeum
markers.desc: Something wicked stirs in the prison.

markers.name: Condemned Mines
markers.desc: These unstable tunnels were shut down by the Cathedral.

markers.name: Raethwind Wilds
markers.desc: Too many have vanished into these woods.

markers.name: Penitent Cairns
markers.desc: Glenfolk know to avoid grottoes the spirits hold sacred.

markers.name: Vault of The Forsaken
markers.desc: The voices in these flooded caves lure many to their demise.

markers.name: Steadfast Barracks
markers.desc: A nest of savage fanatics, drawn to evil long-buried.

markers.name: Akkhan's Grasp
markers.desc: Evil and blood seep through the tomb's ruptured seals.

markers.name: Iron Hold
markers.desc: A scourge stirs within the bowels of a decaying prison.

markers.name: Ruins of Rakhat Keep: Inner Court
Hungering Swamp
markers.desc: A place of great occult power for the witches of Hawezar.

markers.name: Oblivion
markers.desc: The demons of Eriman's Pyre fled to this crumbling prison.

markers.name: Garan Hold
markers.desc: A once mighty stronghold, doomed to burn.

markers.name: Luban's Rest
markers.desc: A warrior and her followers have risen from their tombs.

markers.name: Domhainne Tunnels
markers.desc: Corbach residents hear the screams from the Khazra’s lair.

markers.name: Mariner's Refuge
markers.desc: The Drowned lure shipwrecked sailors to the depths.

markers.name: Kor Valar Ramparts
markers.desc: A corrupted fortress concealing the sins of the Penitents.

markers.name: Aldurwood
markers.desc: In this corrupted wood, blood runs like sap from the trees.

markers.name: Jalal's Vigil
markers.desc: A forest, soured by the agony of its own protector.

markers.name: Serpent's Lair
markers.desc: Once the seat of Mohlon's throne. They want another queen.

markers.name: Mithering Descent
markers.desc: A hidden recess leading to the hair-lined depths.

markers.name: The Broiler
markers.desc: There's more than just dead animals hanging from these hooks

markers.name: Foul Undercrypts
markers.desc: The sealed resting place of the Que-Hegan Sankekur.

markers.name: Shadowed Plunge
markers.desc: Snake Cultists sacrifice the innocent.

markers.name: Demon's Wake
markers.desc: The keep still burns in the wake of Lilith’s attack.

markers.name: Broken Bulwark
markers.desc: Once part of Donan's estate, and razed with the rest.

markers.name: Buried Halls
markers.desc: The Triune fight to reclaim these ancient halls.

markers.name: Path of the Blind
markers.desc: The bloodstained initiation grounds for Triune aspirants.

markers.name: Grinning Labyrinth
markers.desc: These labyrinthine halls have broken far greater warriors.

markers.name: Betrayer's Row
markers.desc: The twisted remains of a town driven mad by envy.

markers.name: Stockades
markers.desc: After a riot, this prison was walled off and made a tomb.

markers.name: Mahjoob's Safehouse
markers.desc: A place of reprieve for the Kehjistani guide.

markers.name: Abandoned Smuggler's Den
markers.desc: Once a den for bandits, it now houses a far worse threat.

markers.name: Carrion Fields
markers.desc: The defilers of this land were cursed to wander it forever.

markers.name: Komdor Temple
markers.desc: A Triune sect cursed to forever walk Sanctuary as goatmen.

markers.name: Ancient's Lament
markers.desc: A tomb and prison for the anguished souls trapped within.

markers.name: Champion's Demise
markers.desc: Once beautiful homelands now overrun with demons.

markers.name: Sealed Archives
markers.desc: An ancient mage hall. Once refuge, now graveyard.

markers.name: Bloodsoaked Crag
markers.desc: A feasting ground for the flesh-hungry.

markers.name: Charnel House
markers.desc: Bodies are stored here, some still alive. Food for demons.

markers.name: Fading Echo
markers.desc: These ruins have become host to a growing army of demons.

markers.name: Commandeered House
markers.desc: A residence forcibly taken over by the Knights Penitent

markers.name: Hideout Entrance
markers.desc: This entrance was obstructed by rubble.

markers.name: Defiled Halls
markers.desc: Once a monument to faith, evil has left these halls twisted.

markers.name: Osric's garrison
markers.desc: A home commandeered as a base by the Knights Penitent

markers.name: Sanguine Chapel
markers.desc: A snowed in abandoned Zakarum church invaded by vampires.

markers.name: Saraan Caldera
markers.desc: A curse festers beneath the Ruins of Saraan.

markers.name: Abandoned Barrow
markers.desc: Abandoned by the Druids since the time of Astaroth

markers.name: Mysterious Gateway
markers.desc: A hellish portal of unknown contents.

markers.name: Immortal Emanation
markers.desc: A hunting ground, when prey is foolish enough to enter.

markers.name: Embered Recess
markers.desc: An ash-covered cellar carrying the smell of burnt remains.

markers.name: Seared Hollow
markers.desc: A torrid cavern etched with fire from the Days of Ash.

markers.name: Hungering Swamp
markers.desc: Powerful ritual magic suffuses this place.

markers.name: Taissa's Memories
markers.desc: Through occult magic, Taissa has allowed us into her mind.

markers.name: Halls of Dark Portent
markers.desc: Elias entered the dark passages underneath the Esret chapel.

markers.name: Wasting Hollow
markers.desc: A bloodstained feeding ground of the cannibal horde.

markers.name: Vizjerei Athenaeum
markers.desc: Ruins belonging to the once great Vizjerei Mage Clan.

markers.name: Kyovashad Sewers
markers.desc: The cavernous, filth-strewn caves beneath Kyovashad.

markers.name: Ominous Cellar
markers.desc: Kvera and Petr shelter Sister Octavia from prying eyes.

markers.name: Ominous Cellar
markers.desc: Kvera's husband has been locked inside for his own safety.

markers.name: Frigid Cellar
markers.desc: Sister Octavia has invited you to witness a miracle.

markers.name: Triune Hideout
markers.desc: Under the Iron Wolves' noses, Triune plot and connive.

markers.name: Charnel Cave
markers.desc: P:ermeated by a faint scent of desiccating remains

markers.name: Lair of the Despoiler
markers.desc: A dark corruption has entered these halls.

markers.name: Abandoned Shack
markers.desc: The cellar of an old homestead, abandoned to the elements.

markers.name: Backwater Storage Cellar
markers.desc: A simple hole in the ground used by the people of Backwater.

markers.name: Eldritch Conclave
markers.desc: A hidden meeting place for the witches of Hawezar.

markers.name: Bitter Cave
markers.desc: A cavern cold enough to freeze your breath on your face.

markers.name: Family Cellar
markers.desc: A cellar owned by a local family, long since abandoned.

markers.name: Forgotten Depths
markers.desc: A shadow lies below these hallowed stones.

markers.name: Hall of the Penitent
markers.desc: This light only draws darker shadows.

markers.name: Echo of the Blessed Mother
markers.desc: Lilith's presence still lingers within you.

markers.name: The Training Grounds
markers.desc: Where curious wanderers go to hone their craft.

markers.name: Ularian Sepulcher
markers.desc: Cursed burial ground, feared by all.

markers.name: Hallowed Stones
markers.desc: Amidst a storm of evil, something hopeful flickers weakly.

markers.name: Vile Hive

markers.name: Remnants of Rage

markers.name: Harbinger's Den

markers.name: Forge of Malice
markers.desc: The fires of hatred continue to burn in this hidden refuge.

markers.name: Hierophant Pyre
markers.desc: Once used to burn opposers of Sankekur, the pyres are relit.

markers.name: Murmuring Spiral

markers.name: Iron Cenotaph

markers.name: Razak's Descent

markers.name: The Hallowed Glacier

markers.name: Velkhova Church Undercroft

markers.name: Crypts of Orbei
markers.desc: The monastery lies in ruin but its lower passages remain.

markers.desc: Blood Money: A Magistrate calls for aid.

markers.name: Wayside Cave
markers.desc: Within the small and lonesome cavern, something thirsts.

markers.name: Fields of Judgement
markers.desc: The breeze bends the grass and whispers your death to you.

markers.name: Feeding Grounds

markers.name: Putrescent Larder
markers.desc: The repugnant air affirms where Lacuni store their meats.

markers.desc: In Your Blood: Take a breath and share the news.

markers.desc: Spirits writhe as hollows screech out in monstrous agony.

markers.name: Durance of Hate

markers.name: Covert Passage

markers.desc: A cannibal larder stocked with human flesh

markers.name: The Doorways to Nowhere

markers.desc: The rot persists even here, though its roots pay in blood.

markers.name: Hidden Ritual Site
markers.desc: A nest born of desperation.

markers.name: Strangling Roothold
markers.desc: Home to countless last breaths, squeezed to choking silence.

markers.name: The Pit
markers.desc: A Horadric mystery buried deep in the veins of the land.

markers.name: The Tower
markers.desc: Built to cull the weak and empower the strong.

markers.name: Seer's Reach
markers.desc: The air is heavy with unsettling quiet. What lurks beneath?

markers.name: Dark Refuge
markers.desc: Rumors of mythical riches circle this derelict crypt.

markers.name: Tormented Forest
markers.desc: Will you lift the forest's curse, or join its haunted ranks?

markers.name: Ouna's Hideout
markers.desc: It was supposed to be her haven.

markers.name: Blistering Roothold
markers.desc: Parched and shriveled earth, drained by unholy rot.

markers.name: Silent Roothold
markers.desc: Eerily still, but for the shuffling of dead flesh.

markers.name: Sayeena's Shop
markers.desc: A shop of curios and trinkets.

markers.name: Ice-Rimed Crypt
markers.desc: A crypt buried in ice, where strange new demons dwell.

markers.name: Buried Outpost
markers.desc: A once thriving outpost, now buried and forgotten.

markers.name: Temple of Belial
markers.desc: A hidden ancient temple, overrun with followers of Belial.

markers.name: Scorched Tunnels
markers.desc: For the stalwart, lava-sculpted caves lead to untold riches.

markers.name: Cataclysm
markers.desc: Centuries of fiery eruptions have transformed these lands.

markers.name: Sayeena's Shop
markers.desc: Sayeena studies lost artifacts and scripture here.

markers.name: Cavern of the Sea Hag
markers.desc: A dank cavern where the Sea Hag gathers her thralls.

markers.name: Sepulture of Scales
markers.desc: Where sight is weighed and found wanting.

markers.name: Vault of Lycander
markers.desc: A sealed vault, long locked away and forgotten by all.

markers.name: The Scar
markers.desc: Sour earth, twisted by Astaroth's sealing.

markers.name: The Docks
markers.desc: A waterfront district of Temis where everything has a price.

markers.name: Palace of the Deceiver
markers.desc: There were glories here once, but now only agonies await.

markers.name: Horadric Vault
markers.desc: Answers will be given, though you may not wish to hear them.

markers.name: Abandoned Alcove
markers.desc: Rotting grandiosity, sand scoured and forgotten.

markers.name: The Sightless Vault
markers.desc: The former resting place of the Eye, sealed in an age past.

markers.name: Gallow's End
markers.desc: The treacherous backstreets of the Crown of the Twin Seas.

markers.name: Drunkards' Row
markers.desc: A collection of disreputable taverns and gaming houses.

markers.name: Fetid Mausoleum

markers.name: Cleon's House

markers.name: Demon's Wake
markers.desc: Charred bodies line ashen halls. Even still, Eldhaime burns.

markers.name: Oaken Cavern
markers.desc: Another pocket of Túr Dúlra, sullied by Astaroth's flames.

markers.name: Hunting Lodge
markers.desc: A shallow cave in volcanic rock, reeking of smoke and blood.

markers.name: Refuge of the Lost
markers.desc: A place of solace under the watchful eye of a deceiver.

markers.name: The Hinterland
markers.desc: Few have traversed this shore, despite the rumored treasure.

markers.name: Submerged Ruins
markers.desc: Long-forgotten ruins held together by coral and barnacles.

markers.name: Naos of Fate
markers.desc: A long-forgotten reliquary of fates.

markers.name: Achaia's Sanctum
markers.desc: The sanguine asylum of Achaia, the Blood Oracle.

markers.name: Sunken Larder
markers.desc: A subterranean storeroom beneath the hills of Philios.

markers.name: Cultist Den

markers.name: Astaroth's Lair
markers.desc: Den of the Charred Duke.

markers.name: Vault of Sins
markers.desc: An ancient vault built by cultists.

markers.name: Alafar's Sanctum
markers.desc: The home and research library of the historian Alafar.

markers.name: Corrupted Palace
markers.desc: An ancient Vizjerei palace, now corrupted by demons.

markers.name: Antediluvian Hollow
markers.desc: A Firstborn ruin, perhaps not fully abandoned.

markers.name: The Garden of Akarat
markers.desc: These ancient walls hide the secrets of the Morlu.

markers.name: Shyan's Safehouse
markers.desc: One of many safehouses Shyan uses.

markers.name: Kraken's Corpse
markers.desc: Home to all manner of scavenger and parasite.

markers.name: Heart of the Mountain
markers.desc: The mountain's hidden heart, molten blood thrumming within.

markers.name: Scoriaceous Path
markers.desc: For the stalwart, lava-sculpted caves lead to untold riches.

markers.name: Tholos of Temis
markers.desc: A chamber where the veteran matriarchs gather to judge.

markers.name: Tholos of Temis
markers.desc: A chamber where the veteran matriarchs gather to judge.

markers.name: Sepulcher of the First Amazon
markers.desc: A sacred tomb honoring Antia, the mother of all Amazons.

markers.name: Sunken Ship
markers.desc: A lost shipwreck pillaged by pirates.

markers.name: Foundered Vessel
markers.desc: A shattered craft, already decaying under the rot of Atanos.

markers.name: Decrepit Crypt
markers.desc: Odors of ancient rot waft from within.

markers.name: Secret Cove

markers.name: Cavern of Echoes
markers.desc: A mysterious cave thrumming with low, murmuring magic.

markers.name: Deadwater Tunnels

markers.desc: The fetid bowels of a massive Hellwyrm.

markers.name: Halls of the Devoured

markers.name: Treacherous Mineshaft
markers.desc: Noxious fumes and demonic chittering seep from the dark maw.

markers.name: Ramshackle Depot
markers.desc: A storeroom and counting house for mine-related dealings.

markers.name: Derelict House

markers.name: Sunken Villa
markers.desc: An ancient home of a Firstborn family, now sunken in time.

markers.name: Murmuring Glade
markers.desc: Leaves and branches sway hypnotically, but no wind blows.

markers.name: Deadhouse
markers.desc: A place where Amazon pyrekeepers tend to the dead.

markers.name: Kakkos' Folly
markers.desc: The ancient adytum of Kakkos, demon of mischief.

markers.name: Secret Bookshop
markers.desc: A hidden bookshop where scholars study forbidden secrets.

markers.name: Lair of Abodian
markers.desc: The smoldering lair reeks of blood and brimstone.

markers.name: Evisceration of Ked Bardu
markers.desc: The 39th Steppe

markers.name: Onslaught at Zarbinzet
markers.desc: Swamp of 1000 Corpses

markers.name: Tragedy at Cerrigar
markers.desc: Where the Wild Things Died

markers.name: Ruin of Gea Kul
markers.desc: The Devil Came Down to Gea Kul

markers.name: Rending of Kyovashad
markers.desc: When the Saints Stopped Marching In

markers.name: Heretic's Sanctum
markers.desc: Forbidden sanctum of Hattar the Warlock.

markers.name: Heretic's Sanctum
markers.desc: Forbidden sanctum of Hattar the Warlock.

markers.name: Labyrinthine Grove
markers.desc: A stretch of ancient woods where Rathma crafted a refuge.

markers.name: Forgotten Hideaway
markers.desc: An ancient refuge, built by Rathma when he was just a child.

markers.name: Temple of the Deathspeaker
markers.desc: A repository of knowledge on the cycle of life and death.

markers.name: Grim Haven
markers.desc: Hatred's contingent gather to carry out their Master's will.

markers.name: Bewitched Grotto
markers.desc: An eerie tune lures the unprepared into a fatal trance.

markers.name: Echo of the False Prophet
markers.desc: Unmask the Lord of Hatred and cast him from this world

markers.name: Basaltic Ascent
markers.desc: Despite being ravaged by magma, these ruins endure.

markers.name: Horadric Vault
markers.desc: A hall of magical study built upon ancient mage clan ruins.

markers.name: Hellish Descent
markers.desc: Are you the hunter or the hunted?

markers.name: Den of the Apostate
markers.desc: Dark pacts beget dark deeds.

markers.name: Enclave of Darkness
markers.desc: Unexpected foes waiting in the shadows.

markers.name: Vault of the Crucible
markers.desc: A lost vault of Zoltun Kulle.

markers.name: The Pools of Creation
markers.desc: Birthplace of Humankind

markers.name: Túr Dúlra

markers.name: Hope's Light
markers.desc: A great lighthouse towering above the jagged shores, its sacred flame has been extinguished

markers.name: Stolen Artifice
markers.desc: A seemingly petty theft has put innocent lives at risk.

markers.name: What Ails Thee
markers.desc: A young man worries about the family he left behind.

markers.name: The Fledgling Merchant
markers.desc: A boy in Cerrigar needs help earning a living.

markers.name: Blood of Brigands
markers.desc: The glenfolk will pay anyone willing to keep the roads safe.

markers.name: A Briny Fate
markers.desc: Some things are best left at sea.

markers.desc: A tangled fate returns to a cursed shore.

markers.name: Threads of Envy
markers.desc: More than a monster waits in the deep.

markers.name: Untangling Truths
markers.desc: Painful memories never remain submerged.

markers.name: Whispers from Below
markers.desc: Beware what calls from the murk.

markers.name: A Deepening Shadow
markers.desc: An ominous power is stirring within the Dark Thicket.

markers.name: The Old Ways
markers.desc: Find a way to cleanse the corruption in the Dark Thicket.

markers.name: A Sliver of Light
markers.desc: Complete the ritual to cleanse the Dark Thicket.

markers.desc: Vasily's Tree is weakening and needs help.

markers.name: Left in Ashes
markers.desc: Scholar Yuein seeks the spirit of his late apprentice.

markers.name: The Wrong Hands
markers.desc: I should bring the broken carving that I found to Artair in Wraithstead, just in case it is part of another druidic totem.

markers.name: A Different Beast
markers.desc: I should bring the broken totem piece that I found to Artair in Wraithstead, so that he can safeguard it until it is destroyed.

markers.name: The Broken Bear
markers.desc: I found the final piece of the totem. I should return to Artair in Wraithstead.

markers.name: Ever Faithful
markers.desc: A grieving mother wants revenge for her daughter's killer.

markers.name: Feral Moon
markers.desc: Help Edan ward off the strange call.

markers.name: First Among Wolves
markers.desc: Uncover the dark secret of the Downs.

markers.name: The Snare
markers.desc: Artair has a plan to lift the werewolf curse.

markers.name: With Fangs Bared
markers.desc: Entrap Una and break the curse.

markers.name: A Plea For Aid
markers.desc: The wounded defenders of Firebreak Manor need assistance.

markers.name: Pyre of Ash
markers.desc: Embers rise again from fires extinguished long ago.

markers.name: Chasing Embers
markers.desc: A trail of death rekindles the Days of Ash.

markers.name: Claws at the Throat
markers.desc: Something sinister stalks the shadows of the Highland Wilds.

markers.name: Wagered Honor
markers.desc: A wager between brothers has gone awry.

markers.name: Remembering the Goose
markers.desc: Memories of the past may heal wounds of the present.

markers.name: The Bear of Blackweald
markers.desc: A shackled beast never forgets or forgives.

markers.name: The Starving Strand
markers.desc: Help a man send food to his hungry family back home.

markers.name: Votive Passing
markers.desc: The dead live on in those who survive.

markers.name: Smoke Signals

markers.name: Reclamation

markers.name: The Seer
markers.desc: Help a Seer trying to divine the source of the famine in Corbach.

markers.name: Chronicling the Old Ways
markers.desc: Help Moreg chronicle the old ways of Scosglen.

markers.name: Stemming the Tide

markers.name: Settling the Tab

markers.name: Tending Nature
markers.desc: Help Moireach tend her injured bear companion.

markers.name: The Diviner
markers.desc: Help restore hope to Túr Dúlra.

markers.name: An Acquired Taste
markers.desc: The villagers of Tirmair will starve without an alternative food source.

markers.name: Of Pests and Pestilence
markers.desc: Fly swarms are infecting the Moors.

markers.name: The Traveling Scholar
markers.desc: Escort Scholar Aria to Túr Dúlra.

markers.name: Kor Dragan
markers.desc: Once a bastion of the Knights Penitent, this desecrated fortress stands abandoned

markers.name: Malnok
markers.desc: An icebound settlement besieged by a ceaseless blizzard

markers.name: Nostrava
markers.desc: A quiet mountain village with a sinister secret

markers.name: Call of the Ancients
markers.desc: The mighty chieftain of the Bear Tribe requests your presence.

markers.name: Shattered Tribute

markers.name: The Beast's Challenge

markers.name: The Cleansing Flame
markers.desc: Light a ritual brazier to ward evil away from Margrave.

markers.name: Cries of Innocence
markers.desc: The tormented spirit of a Black Asylum inmate reaches out for company.

markers.name: Ravenous Dead
markers.desc: The hearts of ghouls may hold a secret power.

markers.name: A Cold Faith
markers.desc: This pilgrim of the Light could not complete his journey.

markers.name: Depths of Despair

markers.name: The Dread Martyr
markers.desc: A dying knight has a final request.

markers.name: Faith in Blood
markers.desc: A familiar-looking man furtively attempts to get your attention.

markers.name: Traveler's Prayer
markers.desc: A note bearing a pilgrim's wisdom.

markers.name: Gold Well Spent
markers.desc: A local merchant will pay handsomely for the return of stolen goods.

markers.name: Hammer of the Champion
markers.desc: Retrieve a fabled weapon from the Rimescar Cavern.

markers.name: Chain of Possession
markers.desc: Seek out the dangerous woman, and the knight she murdered in Menestad.

markers.name: Legacy Unmade
markers.desc: Find Parin near the Sanctified Study to sunder the cursed axe.

markers.name: Malady of the Soul
markers.desc: A priest from the Cathedral of Light needs assistance with a dangerous task.

markers.name: Menestad Coffers
markers.desc: A tithe collector is growing impatient with an overdue collection.

markers.name: Legacies of Light's Watch
markers.desc: A young monk seeks answers about the Knights Penitent.

markers.name: Blood Sermon
markers.desc: Venture into the Sanguine Chapel and find the Red Chalice.

markers.name: The Sealed Door
markers.desc: An eccentric stranger is convinced of a catastrophe about to occur.

markers.name: Sight to Madness
markers.desc: Reclaim Vilek's eyes from the cultists in Nostrava.

markers.name: Better Days
markers.desc: I found a faded old painting of Margrave. Zalan Coste may be interested in this.

markers.name: Unwritten End
markers.desc: I found an old diary detailing the various travels and sales of a merchant. Zalan Coste in Margrave may want to see this.

markers.name: Righteous Idol
markers.desc: I found a wooden figure of a knight. Zalan Coste in Margrave may be interested in this.

markers.name: Secret of the Spring
markers.desc: A crumpled note bears a cryptic message.

markers.name: Raising Spirits
markers.desc: The city militia is bolstering its ranks with fresh blood.

markers.name: Unyielding Flesh
markers.desc: Help Krystyna find her husband in the Gnarled Timbers.

markers.name: The Woodsman of Nevesk
markers.desc: Find the weapon of a local legend.

markers.name: Blood of the Mother
markers.desc: Search Nevesk for evidence of possession.

markers.name: Shroud of the Father
markers.desc: Bring Inarius' token of favor back  to Voszalko.

markers.name: Severing the Bond
markers.desc: Priest Voszalko awaits the opportunity to cleanse your corruption.

markers.name: The Onyx Watchtower
markers.desc: A trader's way station overrun by thieves and murderers

markers.name: The Ruins of Qara-Yisu
markers.desc: The salt-covered ruins of a town afflicted by a sadistic curse

markers.name: Temple of Rot
markers.desc: A rotten, putrid evil has taken up residence in these hallowed halls

markers.name: Sentimental Value

markers.name: Blood and Sweat
markers.desc: Carry a father's dying wish to his daughter.

markers.name: Hubris Smiles Back
markers.desc: The Grinning One's gifts always earn a smile.

markers.name: Reject the Mother
markers.desc: A trampled note with a message of defiance.

markers.name: Exhuming Faith
markers.desc: Walk the Zakarum pilgrim path for great rewards.

markers.name: The Unlucky Ones
markers.desc: A guard seeks an uneventful shift.

markers.name: Malign Devotion
markers.desc: A tradesman has been recruiting help to rebuild a ruined town.

markers.name: Culling of Flesh
markers.desc: Crane tribesmen are overwhelmed with the cannibal uprising.

markers.name: Scorched Debts
markers.desc: A strange smoldering book lays abandoned.

markers.name: Hunting the Relic Hunter
markers.desc: Rahkaan seeks another strange relic for his curio collection.

markers.name: More Than Meets the Eye
markers.desc: There's one more relic to find. Judging by the last two, I doubt this will be a walk in the park.

markers.name: Treasure or Trash
markers.desc: Rakhaan seeks aid in powering a broken ring.

markers.name: Crucible of Worth
markers.desc: Recover the ancestral weapon of the Oxen Tribe.

markers.name: Hunger for a New Life
markers.desc: Help Zolaya and Oyuun move forward with their new life in Farobru

markers.name: Blistered Heart
markers.desc: The Spider Queen has taken her last victim.

markers.name: Thieves' Famine

markers.name: No Deed Unpunished
markers.desc: Prevent the Triune from recruiting bandits near Onyx Watchtower.

markers.name: Kith and Kin
markers.desc: An old woman seeks mementos from those who have died of an ancient curse.

markers.name: A Pound of Flesh
markers.desc: A man in a gibbet pleads for freedom.

markers.name: Phases of the Moon
markers.desc: Workers need talismans to ward off curses in Qara Yisu.

markers.name: Augury of Bones
markers.desc: The dead still have answers for those willing to inquire.

markers.name: Consumed by Pride
markers.desc: Fear devours more than the mind when faced with death.

markers.name: Corroding Mettle
markers.desc: Help a merchant and his ambitious sons.

markers.name: Tarnished Amulet
markers.desc: I found what appears to be a traveler's protection amulet. Someone at the Yinsuk Shrine in Jirandai may be interested in this.

markers.name: Currencies From Afar
markers.desc: I found a pouch containing a variety of old coins. Gesur in Jirandai may be interested in these.

markers.name: Fury Against Fate
markers.desc: The future is only certain for those who do not fear it.

markers.name: Raising Spears
markers.desc: Glory of the dead returns spirit to the living.

markers.name: Salt Begets Salt
markers.desc: Insatiable greed leads to ill-fated deed.

markers.name: Keeping the Old Traditions
markers.desc: A note with a message about traditions.

markers.name: Worthy of Arreat
markers.desc: Help Ealda of the Crane Tribe mend their relationship with the Oxen Tribe.

markers.name: Curious Curios
markers.desc: A curio collector seeks strange relics of the Overseers.

markers.name: In the Name of Love
markers.desc: Rakhaan seeks a dark artifact in the Whispering Vault.

markers.name: Weight of Sin
markers.desc: Bring peace to those who only knew sorrow.

markers.name: Firsthand Knowledge
markers.desc: A Scholar tracking the history of the Zakarum Inquisiton hopes to aid the Cathedral of Light today.

markers.name: What Remains
markers.desc: Victims of the cannibals are rarely afforded the dignity of burial.

markers.name: Alcarnus
markers.desc: A long-abandoned desert city with a terrible past

markers.name: Altar of Ruin
markers.desc: Lost for centuries, legends speak of a malefic temple of great evil

markers.name: Omath's Redoubt
markers.desc: The stench of death and decay lingers heavily over this devastated battlefield

markers.name: The Weapon of a Wolf
markers.desc: Barez, an Iron Wolf at the Palace Library, may be interested in this recovered sword.

markers.name: To Serve Again
markers.desc: I found a lost piece of Iron Wolf armor. The Iron Wolves never leave behind the armor of their fallen kin if they can help it. Their smith, Barez, will want to see this.

markers.name: In Desperate Times
markers.desc: A book containing secrets of the city's defenses.

markers.name: Pinch of Poison
markers.desc: Baraim has need of a special ingredient.

markers.name: Deadly Trade
markers.desc: A hapless merchant can’t fulfill his next shipment.

markers.name: Unsafe Travels
markers.desc: A Kehjistani guide is plagued by troubles.

markers.name: Road to Ruin
markers.desc: Mahjoob's "simple bite" has festered into something more.

markers.name: The Only Cure
markers.desc: Mahjoob's affliction is worsening. A cure must be found quickly.

markers.name: Mirage
markers.desc: A strange figure beckons for you to follow them through the desert.

markers.name: Desiccation
markers.desc: An acolyte of Akarat seeks to aid the Zakarum Chapel.

markers.name: The Pilgrim's Footsteps
markers.desc: A book with a message for the faithful.

markers.name: Symbol of Faith
markers.desc: A Zakarum relic is coveted by unscrupulous collectors. Ensure it stays with the church.

markers.name: Late Shipment
markers.desc: I found a shipment addressed to the Innkeeper in Gea Kul. I should bring it to her.

markers.name: Final Straw
markers.desc: A traveler has lost his companion.

markers.name: A Voice from the Past
markers.desc: This mysterious old shrine calls out for aid.

markers.name: Izel of the Vizjerei
markers.desc: Help Izel restore her human form.

markers.name: The Speaking Stone
markers.desc: A local fisherman has a tall tale to share.

markers.name: When the Tide Comes In
markers.desc: A man buried in the sand. A family slated for execution.

markers.name: Zakarum's Plight
markers.desc: An exhausted Zakarum novitiate wilts from thirst.

markers.name: A Wolf's Honor
markers.desc: An ill-fated expedition has left Asa with a difficult responsibility.

markers.name: Timely Correspondence
markers.desc: I found a letter addressed to the innkeeper in Gea Kul. I should bring it to her.

markers.name: Strange Remedies
markers.desc: The Iron Wolves are deficient in an unsavory medicinal ingredient.

markers.name: Guardians of the Pit
markers.desc: There is a growing threat in the Tar Pits.

markers.name: Seeking Refuge
markers.desc: A traveling group has met an unfortunate fate while traveling to Dahlgur.

markers.name: On the Hunt
markers.desc: A rogue Iron Wolf hunts an elusive mark.

markers.name: More Value Than Gold
markers.desc: The Iron Wolves' water supply has been poisoned.

markers.name: Head of the Snake
markers.desc: Asa and Dawood have a new lead on the bandits operating around the oasis.

markers.name: A Moment of Peace
markers.desc: A moment of peace, but not without cost.

markers.name: An Errant Flock
markers.desc: Aid a mysterious armed man and the group of refugees fleeing Caldeum.

markers.name: Acts of Atonement
markers.desc: The mysterious Edgar suggested I find him in Gea Kul.

markers.name: Justice Delayed
markers.desc: Edgar needs help at the Caldeum overlook.

markers.name: An Unlawful Order
markers.desc: Edgar's former captain must be stopped.

markers.name: Shadow of Alcarnus
markers.desc: Stranded refugees are accosted by demons.

markers.name: Strayed from the Path
markers.desc: After the Cathedral’s purge on Tarsarak, blood will have blood.

markers.name: Payment Past Due
markers.desc: A destitute miner seeks a lost lockbox.

markers.name: Traces of Iron
markers.desc: A man wants a debt repaid to the Iron Wolves.

markers.name: The Way of the Three
markers.desc: Lighting these fires has unlocked a strange altar.

markers.name: Butchers of the North
markers.desc: The roads outside the Zakarum Chapel are overrun with cannibals.

markers.name: Eriman's Pyre
markers.desc: The flames that engulf this remote settlement have raged for decades

markers.name: Crusaders' Monument
markers.desc: An abandoned monument to the failed Zakarum crusade

markers.name: Vyeresz
markers.desc: Deep in the swamps of Hawezar, this village is said to harbor a great mystery

markers.name: Tangled Memories
markers.desc: A mass of vines and viscera groans for help.

markers.name: Growing Reminders
markers.desc: Kres seeks to right a wrong from his past.

markers.name: Unearthed Regrets
markers.desc: Kres is pained with the memories of his past actions.

markers.name: Bad Blood
markers.desc: Test Gulyas' Nangari transformation potion.

markers.name: Brought to Heel
markers.desc: Help Lumir get back at Glin by making them sick with swamp mushrooms.

markers.name: By Three They Come
markers.desc: Discover what Elias what sought in the ruins of Esret.

markers.name: Dead in the Water
markers.desc: A Backwater resident in need offers a glimpse into the harsh realities of daily life.

markers.name: A Debt Repaid
markers.desc: Help a woman square away a debt she owes, before her ship leaves Backwater.

markers.name: Drink to the Past
markers.desc: I should see if Lyndon is interested in sharing a drink with me, as Kingsport ale is finer than the usual swill found in Backwater.

markers.name: Good Riddance
markers.desc: I should see if Lyndon is missing this crossbow. The carved name on it has his distinctively bad handwriting.

markers.name: Overstepping the Mark
markers.desc: Lyndon is the biggest scoundrel I can think of nearby, he might know more about this emblem.

markers.name: Discretionary Spending
markers.desc: Lyndon needs some muscle to ensure a trade deal goes smoothly.

markers.name: Bait the Trap
markers.desc: Lyndon has a foolproof plan to find the rat in Backwater.

markers.name: Dead to Rights
markers.desc: Orton's the rat.

markers.name: Necrotic Research
markers.desc: Help Gulyas with her Nangari research.

markers.name: Poisoned Hearts
markers.desc: A young girl with burgeoning magic power is taken in by a swamp witch.

markers.name: The Greater Good
markers.desc: Recover Backwater's stolen property from the bandits.

markers.name: Turbulent Waters
markers.desc: Search for information about Symon and Elias in the port town of Backwater.

markers.name: Ire of the Witch
markers.desc: An unpaid debt needs to be collected.

markers.name: Perceived Threat
markers.desc: A growing sickness threatens the swamp.

markers.name: Song of Rot
markers.desc: Zurke must kill the sweet sickness he has so lovingly cultivated.

markers.name: Closing the Book
markers.desc: Elder Akos wants to piece together the dark history of Eriman's Pyre.

markers.name: One Little Red Sprig
markers.desc: I found a curious item that Timue might be able to tell me about.

markers.name: Timeworn Effigy
markers.desc: I found a doll that strongly resembles Timue. I should take it to her, just in case it is some form of witchcraft.

markers.name: Venom of the Nangari
markers.desc: I found some venom that has a curious look to it. Maybe Timue knows more about it.

markers.name: The Swamp's Protection
markers.desc: Help Timue check on the other infected.

markers.name: Flesh and Blood
markers.desc: Help Yonca discover what happened to her family.

markers.name: Traveler's Superstition
markers.desc: Attempt the traveler's superstitious ritual.

markers.name: Gift of the Swamp
markers.desc: Escort Marta to the healer in Wejinhani.

markers.name: Fungal Remedies
markers.desc: Assist Yolonda in healing those afflicted with the gut rot.

markers.name: Heart of Mold
markers.desc: As desperation grows, a more effective remedy for gut rot is needed.

markers.name: Desperate Remedies
markers.desc: A strange outbreak in Wejinhani has left the Elders with more questions than answers.

markers.name: A Question of Self
markers.desc: Taissa's tower sits strangely empty.

markers.name: Past Regrets
markers.desc: Taissa must summon aid in her attempts to rid herself of the whispers of Andariel.

markers.name: A Series of Steps
markers.desc: Taissa makes a desperate, final attempt to purge Andariel's whispers from her mind.

markers.name: What Can't Be Cured
markers.desc: Escort Nevan as he travels to Wejinhani in search of a cure.

markers.name: Left Behind
markers.desc: A young Crusader wants the remains of a friend found.

markers.name: Lost Cause
markers.desc: These cultists are making a mockery of the Zakarum faith.

markers.name: At Any Cost
markers.desc: Track Elias' dark path through the marshes of Hawezar.

markers.name: Remnants of Faith
markers.desc: A young Crusader apprentice wishes to carry on her master's legacy.

markers.name: Lost Legacy
markers.desc: A Crusader seeks to rid the Zakarum Fortress of evil.

markers.name: A Price to Pay
markers.desc: A young girl with uncontrollable power has gone missing in the wilderness.

markers.name: Coiled Grasp
markers.desc: A boisterous Crusader is looking for anyone who can hold a sword.

markers.name: The Heretic
markers.desc: A spate of grisly deaths terrifies a group of villagers who fear a dark power is at work.

markers.name: To Walk a Dark Path
markers.desc: Zarbinzet's only priest is concerned for his missing curate.

markers.name: Remembering the Fallen
markers.desc: Ksenia returns to Zarbinzet to ensure the Paladins' sacrifice is remembered.

markers.name: Chakhir
markers.desc: Something noxious has taken root in what remains of this once great city

markers.name: The Festering Dark
markers.desc: Hatred festers in a long-forgotten ruin

markers.name: Kichuk
markers.desc: The gateway to Hawezar, a small village terrorized by an ever-present threat

markers.name: Tenets of Depravity: Sacrament of the Faithless
markers.desc: Investigate the Burned Knight Camp in Seven Stones.

markers.name: Tenets of Depravity: An End to Suffering
markers.desc: Look for Captain Kharov at the Burned Knight Camp in Seven Stones.

markers.name: Tenets of Depravity: Companion to Madness
markers.desc: Investigate the Burned Knight Forward Base in Seven Stones.

markers.name: Tenets of Depravity: Scion of Blasphemies
markers.desc: Travel to the Temple of the Profane in Seven Stones.

markers.name: Tenets of Depravity: Light be with You
markers.desc: Collect a reward for your efforts in the Jungles of Nahantu.

markers.name: The Witness
markers.desc: Follow the Burned Knight candidate as he completes his pilgrimage.

markers.name: What Stems from the Heart
markers.desc: Sacrifices made in life may protect loved ones in death.

markers.name: A Canopy of Corpses
markers.desc: The weight of time does not diminish a warrior's pride.

markers.name: The Bestial Soul of Teganze
markers.desc: Death does not silence a drumming heart.

markers.name: Everything Old
markers.desc: A young man calls out for any passerby who will listen to his tale.

markers.name: Everything Old
markers.desc: A young man calls out for any passerby who will listen to his tale.

markers.name: New Again
markers.desc: Dian has returned to life once again. It is time to free him from the cycle.

markers.name: Tragic Inheritance
markers.desc: A farmer returns to save his family's last cow.

markers.name: Return to Dust
markers.desc: Help Rokla find the Golden Bird in the ruins of upper Kurast.

markers.name: Shroud of Wrath
markers.desc: Hatred blinds sense and reason in desperate times.

markers.name: The Living and the Dying
markers.desc: A young boy needs urgent help to heal his poisoned sister.

markers.name: The Pit of Anguish

markers.desc: A Umbaru woman, chosen by the spirits, prepares for a daunting initiation rite.

markers.name: Cost of Doing Business

markers.name: Midnight Jaguars
markers.desc: Two shadowy jaguar spirits are killing travelers on the road

markers.name: Bloom Where You Are Planted
markers.desc: Life sprouts from life lost—willing or otherwise.

markers.desc: The Captain of the Kurast Scouts is desperate to track down his missing recruits.

markers.name: The Courage to Continue
markers.desc: A villager needs help to stem the tide of darkness.

markers.name: The Keening Spirit
markers.desc: A Spiritborn is afflicted with the pain of a bonded spirit.

markers.name: Where Credit is Due
markers.desc: Help a glory seeker find their place in history.

markers.name: Spilled Blood
markers.desc: Blood spilled on sacred ground.

markers.name: Snatched from the Nest
markers.desc: Rescue the child stolen by the lacuni

markers.name: Tsalir's Blessing
markers.desc: Hunters wish to share in their good fortune.

markers.name: Depraved Wages
markers.desc: Recover the debt of the miners.

markers.name: Bonded Destiny
markers.desc: A young Spiritborn is missing his egg.

markers.name: Love Lotus
markers.desc: Help a haunted man lay his nightmares to rest.

markers.name: The Cat-Eye Curse
markers.desc: A jewel with a sinister aura must be returned to its rightful place.

markers.name: Salt the Earth
markers.desc: Finish a slain alchemist's work to find a solution to the Hollows.

markers.name: The Ravenous Idol
markers.desc: A bizarre idol may be the key to controlling the ravenous hunger of a Goatman-eating spirit

markers.name: The Appeal of Faith
markers.desc: Help a shaman fulfill an aging priest's request.

markers.name: Deafened Mourning
markers.desc: Help the villagers of Gurnok recover from the wildlife attack.

markers.name: Final Rite
markers.desc: Aid Wak'Lan in restoring the Skatsimi horn.

markers.name: By Their Fruits
markers.desc: Discover what became of the people of Gurnok.

markers.name: Lost to the Jungle
markers.desc: A child needs assistance recovering a lost gem.

markers.name: Blood in the Grove
markers.desc: Return the stolen gem to the altar of Sutsarnin Grove.

markers.name: Two Endings
markers.desc: Discover Akarat's teachings about life and death.

markers.name: Xanderos
markers.desc: A sealed ruin of the Firstborn, mysterious and deadly.

markers.name: Saltwind
markers.desc: A jagged outcropping at the edge of the sea, home to shipwrecked pirates, outlaws, and dark secrets.

markers.name: Cosmic Archives
markers.desc: Repository of artifacts from the Dawn of Sanctuary—both angelic and demonic

markers.name: Fortune's Fool
markers.desc: A wayward miner sows chaos in Skartara. Is it madness or something more?

markers.name: To Set Things Right
markers.desc: Can past sins be made right?

markers.name: A Coward's Redemption
markers.desc: Can past sins be made right?

markers.name: Neophyte's Odyssey
markers.desc: A pilgrim, new to Skovos, faces the locals' ire.

markers.name: A Shadow Remains
markers.desc: The pilgrims Bnatros and Adoné have learned that spreading their faith to the Askari is no easy task.

markers.name: The Garden of Akarat
markers.desc: Even after Mephisto's defeat, something dark yet lingers among the followers of Akarat.

markers.name: Sweet to the Taste, Bitter to the Young
markers.desc: A Seer of the Oracle Order is missing a sacred ingredient for her ritual.

markers.name: The Cost of Miracles
markers.desc: A strange gift threatens to tear a family apart.

markers.name: Theft of Fate
markers.desc: To tamper with fate is to invite its end.

markers.name: Abiding Gloom
markers.desc: The brighter the light, the darker the shadow.

markers.name: Craven Karma
markers.desc: The weight of fate shall not be denied.

markers.name: Fate's Reckoning
markers.desc: A memento of sacrifice. A vigil of vengeance.

markers.name: A Glimpse at Good Fortune
markers.desc: A miner claims to have uncovered ancient Firstborn ruins.

markers.name: Shape of the Soul
markers.desc: Thales begs to have Phix's gift removed.

markers.name: The Precipice of Greatness
markers.desc: An ancient Firstborn ritual may be the only chance Thales has for peace.

markers.name: Blood for Truth
markers.desc: Something evil prowls the streets of Lower Temis.

markers.name: Blood for Coin
markers.desc: To disrupt a criminal gang, Valeria needs someone on the inside.

markers.name: Blood for Justice
markers.desc: The Morlu-taming Marcellus remains at large in Skovos.

markers.name: Crown of Ash and Ember
markers.desc: The wounds in Skovos are deep, and true healing cannot begin until a new queen rises.

markers.name: The Threefold Offering
markers.desc: Tharra seeks the Oracle's path to heal the divide among the daughters of Skovos.

markers.name: Where the Wound Still Weeps
markers.desc: Guided by the Oracle, Tharra begins mending the wounds she carries within.

markers.name: First of Her Name
markers.desc: Tharra submits herself to the Council's verdict for who will become the next Queen of Skovos.

markers.name: A Scholar's Blunder
markers.desc: A historian at the Temple of Life arranged for the transport of a Firstborn artifact, but the ship carrying it is mysteriously overdue.

markers.name: A Pirate's Plunder
markers.desc: Drollon's missing shipment was taken by pirates who may have ties to Saltwind.

markers.name: The Night Voyagers
markers.desc: A shipwrecked sailor on the coast of Atanos tells of a monstrous attack that killed his crew.

markers.name: Port in a Storm
markers.desc: Two of the vampires from Fractured Peaks are dead. One remains at large...but not for long.

markers.name: Blood in the Red Forest
markers.desc: A pilgrim wants to lay his family to rest.

markers.name: Legacy of the Sightless
markers.desc: To bring clarity to her strange visions, a bold Seer aims to restore the Sightless Eye.

markers.name: Sight Thrice Paid
markers.desc: Despite a divine warning to abandon the Eye, Seer Athrpa remains determined to restore it.

markers.name: Ashes in the Eye
markers.desc: Guided by Lycander, Seer Athrpa embarks on her final attempt to cleanse the Sightless Eye.

markers.name: Of Wolves and Lambs
markers.desc: A strange notice left by one of the Mother's Faithful.

markers.name: Of Blood Unwilling
markers.desc: A cult's designs surface in Atanos, where their influence has begun to spread.

markers.name: Of Void and Vessel
markers.desc: The Midwife cult works to draw forth what was cast beyond the Void.

markers.name: Diluvian Blade
markers.desc: A mysterious aquatic stranger is haunted by her distant past.

markers.name: Vision of the Past
markers.desc: The truth deserves to be remembered, no matter the cost.

markers.name: Understand the Past
markers.desc: The truth deserves to be remembered, no matter the cost.

markers.name: Defend the Past
markers.desc: The truth deserves to be remembered, no matter the cost.

markers.name: Fight for the Past
markers.desc: The truth deserves to be remembered, no matter the cost.

markers.name: Bleating of Lambs
markers.desc: Cowards are quick to betray innocence and reason.

markers.name: Folly of the Flock
markers.desc: A coward's cage is built by their own hands.

markers.name: Lion Among Lambs
markers.desc: Heroes rise amid the folly of fools.

markers.name: Brothers in Arms
markers.desc: A Knight Penitent in Skovos wishes to learn the fate of a former comrade.

markers.name: Tower of Silence
markers.desc: Drowned corpses are piling up and spreading an unusual sickness in the Amazon garrison. An Amazon pyrekeeper needs your help to burn them.

markers.name: A Tapestry of Heroes and Legends
markers.desc: The Observatory lies in ruins, its knowledge destroyed.

markers.name: Favor for a Favor
markers.desc: Our friendly fisherman has an odd request.

markers.name: The One That Got Away
markers.desc: Why does Shi Yugong want fish so badly? There is more to this story.

markers.name: The Fish of Dreams
markers.desc: Here's hoping a fish can jog Shi Yugong's memory.

markers.name: Brine and Blood
markers.desc: A slain beast coughs up an arm.

markers.name: Brine and Bile
markers.desc: A sailor's obsession leads you into dangerous waters.

markers.name: Brine and Brimstone
markers.desc: Myveli leads you to the Red Eel, determined to have her prize.
